title: The Noah Begins to Fall
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #3, Fukaboshi, Hody Jones, Luffy. The central beat is the noah begins to fall.
scene: The scene focuses on the noah begins to fall, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #3, Fukaboshi, Hody Jones, Luffy shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll smash that whole ship to pieces...

summary: The Noah Begins to Fall. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
